### Props

| Name               | Type      | Required | Default                                                            | Description                                                                      |
| ------------------ | --------- | -------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `register`         | `string`  | ✓        | —                                                                  | OpenRegister register id (slug or uuid).                                         |
| `schema`           | `string`  | ✓        | —                                                                  | OpenRegister schema id (slug or uuid).                                           |
| `objectId`         | `string`  | ✓        | —                                                                  | Parent object id.                                                                |
| `surface`          | `string`  |          | `'detail-page'`                                                    | Rendering surface (AD-19).                                                       |
| `value`            | `string   | object`  |                                                                    | `null`                                                                           | For `surface === 'single-entity'`: the canonical XWiki page reference (`Space.Page`) to render as a chip. Ignored on the other surfaces. |
| `apiBase`          | `string`  |          | `'/apps/openregister/api'`                                         | Base API URL.                                                                    |
| `maxDisplay`       | `number`  |          | `5`                                                                | Max rows on the compact surfaces.                                                |
| `collapsible`      | `boolean` |          | `false`                                                            | Whether the card collapses.                                                      |
| `title`            | `string`  |          | `''`                                                               | Override the card title (defaults to the translated label).                      |
| `noPagesLabel`     | `string`  |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'No linked articles')`                | Pre-translated empty-state label when no pages are linked.                       |
| `openInXwikiLabel` | `string`  |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'Open in XWiki')`                     | Pre-translated label for the "Open in XWiki" link below the detail-page preview. |
| `unavailableLabel` | `string`  |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'XWiki is not reachable right now.')` | Pre-translated message shown when XWiki / OpenConnector is unreachable.          |
